prompt: Ask clarifying questions about the feature spec to identify underspecified areas
Run /spec-kitty.clarify to detect and reduce ambiguity in the active feature specification
Clarify the underspecified parts of the spec before we start planning
Create a plan from the clarified spec using spec-kitty plan
Implement the feature tasks defined in tasks.md
Analyze the spec.md for inconsistencies and duplications with /spec-kitty.analyze
